note: The daily task writes one queue file per day. fetch_transcripts.py reads files matching YYYY-MM-DD.json, pulls transcripts via the API, and sets each item's status to 'done'.

videos.title: The FASTEST Way Find Online Arbitrage Products for Amazon FBA (2026)
videos.why: Published Jun 7 2026; claims a fastest-path sourcing workflow. Check whether it adds a concrete technique beyond the storefront-stalking / Keepa-PF / reverse-sourcing playbook already deep in the corpus, or is another 101 rehash.
